mapper.select:
SELECT mi.inventory_id, mi.material_id, m.material_name AS materialName, m.material_type AS materialType, mi.quantity, m.unit AS unit, mi.expiration_date, m.safety_stock AS safetyStock, mi.inventory_status, mi.last_movement_date, mi.warehouse_code, mi.actual_quantity FROM material_inventory mi JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE 1=1
AND ( mi.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY
mi.material_id m.material_name m.material_type mi.quantity m.safety_stock mi.inventory_status mi.expiration_date mi.last_movement_date mi.warehouse_code mi.last_movement_date
${sortOrder}
ORDER BY mi.last_movement_date DESC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_inventory mi JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE 1=1
AND ( mi.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
